name: LaCache: Exact Caching and Precision-Adaptive Inference for Diffusion Large Language Models
summary: arXiv:2607.16339v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Diffusion-based Large Language Models(DLLMs) enable parallel generation via Semi-Autoregressive (SAR) decoding in text generation. However, current m...
description: arXiv:2607.16339v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Diffusion-based Large Language Models(DLLMs) enable parallel generation via Semi-Autoregressive (SAR) decoding in text generation. However, current methods suffer from severe operator-level redundancy: they recompute the entire sequence during denoising steps, ignoring that the prefix and masked suffix remain invariant within a block. We propose L...
author: Xingru Chen, Zelang Liang, Yongjia Ma, Jiqing Zhan, Shuling Yang, Lian Wen, Kun Zhan
